body: Thanks for sending over the updated deck, Chloe — I went through it last night and came away genuinely impressed by the progress you've made on the MRV methodology since we last spoke. The integration layer you've built between IoT sensor data and your on-chain ledger is exactly the kind of defensible technical moat I look for at this stage. I've been sharing [CarbonLedger](companies/carbonledger) internally with the rest of the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) team, and there's real enthusiasm around the table. I'd love to set up a deeper technical diligence call with our infrastructure lead sometime next week — would Thursday or Friday work on your end? In the meantime, if you could share the data room link when it's ready, that would help us move efficiently toward a term sheet conversation.
